candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line appears below gross profit among operating expense lines, not as a COGS/cost of services subcomponent of the selected COGS row 'Direct cost of services rendered'. Adding it to COGS would risk misclassification.
Granular component of total D&A and not identified as COGS-related. If any D&A were to be used, the summary row would be preferred over components.
Granular amortization component under the operating D&A section, not specifically tied to COGS. Prefer summary row instead of components.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible D&A rows sit in the operating-expense section below gross profit, alongside SG&A-type lines, so they should not be added to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line presented at the same level as other operating expense lines and outside the selected XSGA component rows ('Payroll and related expenses', 'Other operating expenses', 'Services expense'). This indicates it should be added separately to avoid omission. Summary row preferred over the more granular D&A components beneath it.
Granular component of total D&A. Do not select if the summary row 'Depreciation and amortization' is selected, to avoid double counting.
Granular component of total D&A. Summary row is preferable.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of specific operating expense components and does not appear to include the standalone D&A line. Because 'Depreciation and amortization' is shown separately in the operating section and no dedicated R&D expense row was selected in XRD, the summary D&A row should be added separately to XSGA. Component amortization/depreciation rows are excluded to avoid double counting.
